title: Introducing Apache Spark Connect support in AWS Glue interactive sessions
summary: Apache Spark Connect bridges the gap between these two worlds: you develop in local Python, but execute on AWS Glue against actual data. Today, AWS Glue interactive sessions support Spark Connect natively. title: The productivity gains hiding in your data infrastructure
summary: Budgets aren't growing, but the work is. See how dbt customers recouped 58.7 FTEs in capacity, worth $1.75M a year.

title: Introducing Meerkat: an experiment in global consensus
summary: Cloudflare Research is building a global consensus service called Meerkat that uses a new consensus algorithm called QuePaxa. We plan to use Meerkat to build a strongly consistent, fault-tolerant key-value store, and other applications.
